title: Student Loans Interest and Repayment Threshold Announcement for Plan 2 and Plan 3 loans
body: "Income Contingent Repayment Student Loans  Undergraduate loans  Income Contingent Student Loans for Plan 2 (2012-2023) undergraduate loans  The income threshold and the lower interest rate threshold for repayment of Plan 2 loans to apply from April 2026 is £29,385.  The higher interest threshold for repayment of Plan 2 loans to apply from April 2026 is £52,885.  Postgraduate Loans – Plan 3  The income thresholds for repayment of Postgraduate Masters and Doctoral Loans to apply from April 2026 is £21,000. "
